questions.questionText: A person responsible for designing, writing, and modifying computer programs is called a:
questions.explanation: الإجابة الصحيحة هي "System analyst" بحسب النص المستخرج من الملف.

questions.questionText: System programmers write programs that provide interface and functionality to:
questions.explanation: الإجابة الصحيحة هي "Application software" بحسب النص المستخرج من الملف.

questions.questionText: The first phase of the Program Development Cycle is:
questions.explanation: الإجابة الصحيحة هي "Coding" بحسب النص المستخرج من الملف.

questions.questionText: An algorithm is defined as a finite sequence of explicit instructions that:
options: Runs indefinitely until memory is full
Produces output for a set of inputs and then terminates
Must be written in a high-level language
questions.correctAnswerText: Runs indefinitely until memory is full
questions.explanation: الإجابة الصحيحة هي "Runs indefinitely until memory is full" بحسب النص المستخرج من الملف.

questions.questionText: A flowchart is best described as:
options: A pictorial representation of an algorithm using shapes and arrows
A written explanation of a program
A table of conditions and actions
questions.explanation: الإجابة الصحيحة هي "A type of programming language" بحسب النص المستخرج من الملف.

questions.questionText: In pseudocode, the keyword used to indicate an OUTPUT operation is:
questions.explanation: الإجابة الصحيحة هي "GET" بحسب النص المستخرج من الملف.

questions.questionText: A decision table consists of how many quadrants?
questions.explanation: الإجابة الصحيحة هي "Two" بحسب النص المستخرج من الملف.

questions.questionText: Which testing technique requires NO prior knowledge of the internal architecture?
questions.explanation: الإجابة الصحيحة هي "White box testing" بحسب النص المستخرج من الملف.

questions.questionText: Syntax errors in a program are also known as:
questions.explanation: الإجابة الصحيحة هي "Logical errors" بحسب النص المستخرج من الملف.

questions.questionText: Which generation of programming language uses abbreviations instead of binary numbers?
questions.explanation: الإجابة الصحيحة هي "Machine language (1GL)" بحسب النص المستخرج من الملف.

questions.questionText: A program that translates assembly language into machine language is called:
questions.explanation: الإجابة الصحيحة هي "Compiler" بحسب النص المستخرج من الملف.

questions.questionText: Most high-level languages are:
questions.explanation: الإجابة الصحيحة هي "Machine dependent" بحسب النص المستخرج من الملف.

questions.questionText: Which of the following is NOT a valid C++ variable name?
questions.explanation: الإجابة الصحيحة هي "student_name" بحسب النص المستخرج من الملف.

questions.questionText: C++ names are:
options: Converted to uppercase by the compiler
questions.explanation: الإجابة الصحيحة هي "Case-insensitive" بحسب النص المستخرج من الملف.

questions.questionText: The memory size of a char variable in C++ is:
questions.explanation: الإجابة الصحيحة هي "1 byte" بحسب النص المستخرج من الملف.

questions.questionText: Which C++ data type stores a value of true or false?
questions.explanation: الإجابة الصحيحة هي "True" بحسب النص المستخرج من الملف.

questions.questionText: The memory size of a double data type in C++ is:
questions.explanation: الإجابة الصحيحة هي "2 bytes" بحسب النص المستخرج من الملف.

questions.questionText: To declare a constant in C++, which keyword is used?
questions.explanation: الإجابة الصحيحة هي "static" بحسب النص المستخرج من الملف.

questions.questionText: The modulus operator (%) returns:
options: The remainder when one number is divided by another
The absolute difference between two numbers
questions.explanation: الإجابة الصحيحة هي "The quotient of two numbers" بحسب النص المستخرج من الملف.

questions.questionText: Which operator checks if two values are NOT equal in C++?
questions.explanation: الإجابة الصحيحة هي "==" بحسب النص المستخرج من الملف.

questions.questionText: The pre-increment operator (++x) in C++ does which of the following?
options: Returns x, then increments x by one
Increments x by one, then returns x
questions.correctAnswerText: Returns x, then increments x by one
questions.explanation: الإجابة الصحيحة هي "Returns x, then increments x by one" بحسب النص المستخرج من الملف.

questions.questionText: Comments in C++ are used to:
options: Help programmers understand the code; they are ignored by the compiler
questions.explanation: الإجابة الصحيحة هي "Speed up program execution" بحسب النص المستخرج من الملف.

questions.questionText: Which header file must be included to use cin and cout in C++?
questions.explanation: الإجابة الصحيحة هي "<stdio.h>" بحسب النص المستخرج من الملف.

questions.questionText: The main() function in C++ is:
options: The point where all C++ programs start their execution
questions.explanation: الإجابة الصحيحة هي "Optional in every program" بحسب النص المستخرج من الملف.

questions.questionText: Which of the following is used to input data from the keyboard in C++?
questions.explanation: الإجابة الصحيحة هي "cout" بحسب النص المستخرج من الملف.

questions.questionText: The if...else statement is also known as:
questions.explanation: الإجابة الصحيحة هي "Single-selection statement" بحسب النص المستخرج من الملف.

questions.questionText: The conditional operator in C++ uses which symbols?
questions.explanation: الإجابة الصحيحة هي "&& ||" بحسب النص المستخرج من الملف.

questions.questionText: When multiple statements need to be controlled by one if statement, they should be enclosed in:
questions.explanation: الإجابة الصحيحة هي "Parentheses ( )" بحسب النص المستخرج من الملف.

questions.questionText: The 'dangling else' rule in C++ states that an else goes with:
options: The last if in the program
questions.explanation: الإجابة الصحيحة هي "The first unmatched if" بحسب النص المستخرج من الملف.

questions.questionText: In a switch statement, which keyword is used as the default action when no case matches?

questions.explanation: الإجابة الصحيحة هي "True" بحسب النص المستخرج من الملف.

options: No uncertainty about which instruction is next
Description must be finite (cannot be open-ended)
Must terminate after a finite number of steps
Must be general enough to handle any contingency Section 6: Short Answer — Model Answers

questions.questionText: System programmer: writes programs controlling/interfacing hardware (e.g. OS). Application programmer: writes programs for specific user tasks (e.g. inventory, payroll).

questions.questionText: Black box: tester has no knowledge of internal code; only inputs/outputs known. White box: tester uses explicit knowledge of code structure to design tests.

questions.questionText: A group of two or more statements enclosed in { } treated as one statement. e.g. if (x<5) { x=x+10; cout<<x; }

questions.questionText: Ambiguity about which if an else belongs to in nested ifs. Rule: else goes with the CLOSEST unmatched if. Fix: use { } to group the inner if.

questions.questionText: Syntax error: violates language grammar — compiler flags it (easier). Logical error: flaw in program logic — no error message; program runs but gives wrong output (harder to find).

Algorithm
options: Translates high-level language to machine language ___ 2. Flowchart
A finite sequence of steps to solve a problem ___ 3. Pseudocode
Informal, structured language describing logic ___ 4. Compiler
Detects, isolates and corrects bugs ___ 5. Debugging
Pictorial representation of algorithm steps ___ 6. bool

C++ data type storing true or false ___ 7. cin G. Used to input data from the keyboard ___ 8. cout H. Used to output data to the screen ___ 9. const I. Keyword to declare a constant ___ 10. #include J. Preprocessor directive to include header files ___ 11. Modulus (%) K. Returns the remainder of integer division ___ 12. if…else L. Double-selection statement in C++ ___ 13. White box testing M. Testing with knowledge of internal code structure ___ 14. Decision table N. Tabular representation of conditions and actions ___ 15. questions.questionText: Five properties of a well-defined algorithm:
options: No uncertainty about which instruction is next
The description must be finite (cannot be open-ended)
It must terminate after a finite number of steps

It must be general enough to deal with any contingency Section 6: Short Answer — Model Answers 1. A system programmer writes programs that control and interface with hardware (e.g., operating systems). An application programmer writes programs for specific user tasks such as inventory control or payroll systems. 2. Black box testing does not require knowledge of the internal code; the tester only knows the inputs and expected outputs. White box testing uses explicit knowledge of the internal code structure to select test data and examine outputs. 3. The #include <iostream.h> directive notifies the preprocessor to include the input/output stream header, allowing the program to use cout (output) and cin (input) for screen/keyboard interaction. 4. Pre-increment (++x) increments x by one first, then returns the new value. Post-increment (x++) returns the current value of x first, then increments it by one. 5. A compound statement is a group of two or more statements enclosed in curly brackets { } treated as a single statement by the if/else. Example: if (x<5) { x = x+10; cout << x; } 6. Syntax: if (condition) statement1; else statement2; Example: if (grade >= 50) cout << "Passed"; else cout << "Failed"; 7. The dangling else problem occurs when it is unclear which if an else belongs to in nested if statements. The rule is: an else goes with the closest unmatched if. To force an else to pair with a specific if, use curly brackets { } to group the inner if. 8. A syntax error results from violating the grammar rules of the language (easier to detect—compiler flags them). A logical error is a flaw in the program's logic that produces incorrect results without generating an error message (harder to detect because the program runs without crashing). 9. The four quadrants are: (1) Conditions — lists all possible conditions; (2) Condition Alternatives — lists the set of values for each condition; (3) Actions — lists operations to be performed; (4) Action Entries — specifies which actions to perform for each combination of condition alternatives. 10.
questions.explanation: الإجابة الصحيحة هي "No ambiguity in any instruction" بحسب النص المستخرج من الملف.
